clips.title: Showroom
clips.prompt: High-end 3D CGI render, ray-traced, physically-based materials, glossy reflections, cinematic. Present day. A dark reflective studio floor, a glossy sports car under soft key lights, faint haze. Studio, controlled. A person in a sharp suit stands beside the car, one hand on the roof, admiring it. Rim-lit tires, a light-bank reflection, subtle fog. Soft studio key with crisp rim light. Slow orbit. Sleek 3D CGI aesthetic, 24fps.

clips.title: The Corridor
clips.prompt: High-end 3D CGI render, ray-traced, physically-based materials, glossy reflections, cinematic. Sci-fi future. A sleek metallic spaceship corridor, glowing floor strips, ribbed reflective walls. Interior, tense. A person in a fitted flight suit walks the corridor, glancing at a wall panel. Blinking readouts, a sealed blast door, mirror reflections. Cool blue tech light, high contrast. Side tracking. Detailed 3D CGI aesthetic, 24fps.

clips.title: Assembly
clips.prompt: High-end 3D CGI render, ray-traced, physically-based materials, glossy reflections, cinematic. Present day. A vast automated factory, rows of robotic arms, conveyor belts, steel racks. Interior, industrial. A person in a hard hat and vest watches the arms assemble parts, tablet in hand. Sparks, warning beacons, hydraulic lines. Cool industrial light with warm spark glow. Slow dolly in. Precise 3D CGI aesthetic, 24fps.

clips.title: Crystal Cavern
clips.prompt: High-end 3D CGI render, ray-traced, physically-based materials, glossy reflections, cinematic. Fantasy. A glowing crystal cavern, huge translucent crystals, refracted light beams. Underground, luminous. A person in trek gear steps forward holding a lantern, awed by the glow. Glinting facets, a coiled rope, drifting mist. Cool crystal glow with warm lantern light. Slow dolly in. Luminous 3D CGI aesthetic, 24fps.

clips.title: Skyline
clips.prompt: High-end 3D CGI render, ray-traced, physically-based materials, glossy reflections, cinematic. Sci-fi future. A high balcony over a vast futuristic city, mega-towers, streams of flying traffic, dusk. Evening, epic. A person in a long coat stands at the rail overlooking the skyline. Holographic billboards, aircraft, low mist. Cool dusk with neon city glow. Crane rise. Expansive 3D CGI aesthetic, 24fps.

clips.title: The Hangar
clips.prompt: High-end 3D CGI render, ray-traced, physically-based materials, glossy reflections, cinematic. Sci-fi future. A huge hangar, a towering humanoid mech, scaffolding, catwalks. Interior, monumental. A person in a flight suit stands before the mech looking up, tiny by comparison. Heavy cables, floodlights, drifting steam. Cool hangar light with warm floods. Static wide. Monumental 3D CGI aesthetic, 24fps.

clips.title: Deep Station
clips.prompt: High-end 3D CGI render, ray-traced, physically-based materials, glossy reflections, cinematic. Present day. An underwater research base interior, a huge curved viewport, deep blue sea beyond. Interior, calm. A person in a jumpsuit stands at the viewport watching a whale pass. Control panels, rising bubbles, soft glow. Cool blue exterior with warm interior light. Slow dolly in. Immersive 3D CGI aesthetic, 24fps.

clips.title: Orbit
clips.prompt: High-end 3D CGI render, ray-traced, physically-based materials, glossy reflections, cinematic. Present day. A space station module, a round window with Earth glowing below, handrails. Interior, weightless. A person in a flight suit floats at the window, gazing down at Earth. A floating pen, harness straps, a star field. Soft Earthshine with cool cabin light. Slow dolly in. Awe-inspiring 3D CGI aesthetic, 24fps.

clips.title: Server Hall
clips.prompt: High-end 3D CGI render, ray-traced, physically-based materials, glossy reflections, cinematic. Present day. A neon server hall, endless racks, glowing indicator lights, a raised glass floor. Interior, cold. A person in a jacket walks between the rows checking a handheld device. Fiber cables, cold-air haze, blinking LEDs. Cool cyan glow, high contrast. Side tracking. Sleek 3D CGI aesthetic, 24fps.

clips.title: Red Planet
clips.prompt: High-end 3D CGI render, ray-traced, physically-based materials, glossy reflections, cinematic. Sci-fi. A photoreal alien desert, rippled red dunes, a detailed six-wheeled rover. Harsh daylight. A person in a spacesuit stands beside the rover surveying the horizon. A whip antenna, wheel tracks, blowing dust. Hard sun with warm dust haze. Static wide. Grounded 3D CGI aesthetic, 24fps.

clips.title: Holo Lab
clips.prompt: High-end 3D CGI render, ray-traced, physically-based materials, glossy reflections, cinematic. Sci-fi future. A high-tech lab, glowing holographic displays floating in the air, glass walls. Interior, focused. A person in a lab coat manipulates a hologram with a gesture, concentrating. A workstation, cable runs, blue holo glow. Cool holographic light, crisp reflections. Slow dolly in. Futuristic 3D CGI aesthetic, 24fps.

clips.title: Glass Lobby
clips.prompt: High-end 3D CGI render, ray-traced, physically-based materials, glossy reflections, cinematic. Present day. A futuristic glass skyscraper lobby, mirror-polished floor, towering windows, daylight. Interior, pristine. A person in business attire crosses the lobby, sharp reflections underfoot. A reception desk, tall plants, sky beyond. Bright daylight with glossy reflections. Slow dolly in. Pristine 3D CGI aesthetic, 24fps.
